## 🐛 Bug Description

A description of the execution failure or error.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
npm run run-example <example-name>
```

1. Run example `...`
2. See error output `...`

## Expected Behavior

What the example script should have done.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x, 22.x]
- Stellar SDK Example Hub version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Logs / Output

```
Paste any relevant log output or error stack trace here
```
